projectDescription: VOZI is an educational Flutter app for children ages 4–7 that teaches Spanish phoneme pronunciation through interactive listening, voice recognition practice, rewards, and an adult supervision panel.
keyFeatures: 9-phoneme learning path (R, RR, S, L, TR, PR, PL, BR, BL) with 10 words each
On-device speech-to-text (STT) with Levenshtein-based word evaluation — no audio ever leaves the device
Text-to-speech (TTS) model audio with real MP3 word recordings as fallback
Animated Rive character rewards unlocked at ≥90% session accuracy
PIN-protected adult dashboard with progress tracking, attempt history, and per-phoneme summaries
Local-first data storage using shared_preferences with optional Supabase cloud sync
Premium mode (demo) unlocking all phonemes beyond the free 'R' sound
Multi-child profile management with emoji avatars and age bands (4–5, 6–7)
Developer mode for demo and testing purposes
Privacy-first design: zero audio or transcript data ever uploaded
publicApiSurface: Phoneme enum (R, RR, S, L, TR, PR, PL, BR, BL) with code, displayName, order
Supabase tables: adults, children, sound_progress, practice_attempts, premium
